allow: Bash(node -e "const v=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/dev/stdin'',''utf8''\)\); const v8=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''8.''\)\); console.log\(''8.x versions:'', v8.slice\(-10\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''latest:'', v[v.length-1]\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v8=[x for x in v if x.startswith\(''8.''\)]; print\(''8.x versions \(last 10\):'', v8[-10:]\); print\(''latest:'', v[-1]\)")
